Algorithm

Controls

Try to balance the pole yourself in HUMAN mode, or switch to AI AGENT to train a reinforcement learning algorithm to do it automatically. Pick an algorithm, hit TRAIN AGENT, and watch it learn over hundreds of episodes. Click any point on the training chart to replay the agent from that moment.

Training MARATHON
